behavior_summary: Provides item event handlers for a skeleton prop: an inspect ('U8P_BONES3::look') handler that presents a short description, and a use/activate handler that either closes a UI gump, opens a gump, or emits a curse message depending on item state and chance.
Both handlers set the item's info/process-exclude state at start (per-item bookkeeping) before performing their primary action.
BONES3::look simply sends the static string "skeleton " to the inspecting player's PID (via Item::bark) and then yields/suspends.

BONES3::use reads the item's status word (Item::getStatus). If bit 0x0100 is clear it closes any open gump (Item::closeGump) and returns. If bit 0x0100 is set it generates a random number in 0..99 (urandom(0x64)) and: if random > 0x5F opens a gump with parameter 0x0C (Item::openGump(0x0C)); otherwise barks "A curse be upon your soul! " to the player and suspends.
notable_control_flow: Entry: handlers are triggered by item events (U8P_BONES3::look/use). Execution begins by setting per-item info/process-exclude flags.
In use: a status-word test (Item::getStatus & 0x0100) is the primary guard that decides between immediate gump-close and the randomized branch.
If the 0x0100 bit is set, urandom(100) is compared to 0x5F; two mutually-exclusive outcomes follow: open gump (success/high roll) or bark a curse and suspend (low roll).
Look handler is linear: set flags → Item::bark("skeleton ") → bookkeeping (implies/pop) → suspend/return.
open_questions: Exact semantic meaning of the status bit 0x0100 on the item (appears to be an 'active' or 'has-gump' flag, inferred).
Precise purpose or contents of the gump identified/parameterized by 0x0C (inferred to be a UI dialog specific to this skeleton).
Meaning and broader effects of the 'info/process-exclude' flags set at handler start (they are per-item and likely prevent duplicate processing or mark the item as being handled).
Whether the suspend after the curse bark implies a timed pause visible to players or simply a script yield/internal scheduling detail.

main_function.name: U8P_BONES3::look
main_function.purpose: Handle the 'U8P_BONES3::look' (inspect) event for the skeleton item by presenting a short description string to the inspecting player and performing script bookkeeping.
entry_conditions: Invoked by the engine when an actor/player inspects or 'looks at' the skeleton item (Event 0 semantics / enterFastArea style trigger).
Item pointer is passed implicitly (inferred at BP+06h).

function_map.name: U8P_BONES3::look
function_map.role: Inspect handler that displays the skeleton description to the player and suspends.

function_map.name: U8P_BONES3::use
function_map.role: Use/activate handler that gates behavior on a status bit and a random roll to either close/open gumps or emit a curse.

function_map.name: Item::bark
function_map.role: Engine-provided call used to send/display text from an item to a player/process.

function_map.name: Item::getStatus
function_map.role: Engine-provided call returning an item's status word/flags used for conditional logic.

function_map.name: Item::closeGump
function_map.role: Engine call to close any open UI gump associated with the item.

function_map.name: urandom
function_map.role: Random number generator used to introduce chance (called with 0x64 to produce 0..99).

function_map.name: Item::openGump
function_map.role: Engine call to open a UI gump on the item (called with parameter 0x0C in this script).

external_calls.purpose: Display the static inspect string "skeleton " to the inspecting player PID.
Retrieve the item's status word to test bit 0x0100 and decide the branch of behavior.
Close any open UI gump when the 0x0100 status bit is clear.
Produce a 0..99 random value (urandom(0x64)) to choose between opening a gump or barking a curse.
Open a UI gump with parameter 0x0C when the random check passes (random > 0x5F).
Emit the curse string "A curse be upon your soul! " to the player's PID on the failing/random branch, then suspend.

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: Provides item event handlers for a skeleton prop: an inspect ('U8P_BONES3::look') handler that presents a short description, and a use/activate handler that either closes a UI gump, opens a gump, or emits a curse message depending on item state and chance.
